question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 5, 9:00AM-9:15AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Cade Cunningham: Assists Over 9.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 4 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "No" if Cade Cunningham records 9.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

question: Set Handicap: Nava (-1.5) vs Djere (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Emilio Nava and Laslo Djere in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 5 2026.
This market will resolve to "Nava" if Emilio Nava wins by 2 or more sets than Laslo Djere, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Djere."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP results.
groupItemTitle: Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification: Emilio Nava vs Laslo Djere Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification: Emilio Nava vs Laslo Djere
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Emilio Nava and Laslo Djere in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 4 at 11:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Nava' if Emilio Nava advances against Laslo Djere.

This market will resolve to 'Djere' if Laslo Djere advances against Emilio Nava.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers on the tennis match between Michael Mmoh and Patrick Kypson in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, Qualification, scheduled for January 4 at 10:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Mmoh' if Michael Mmoh advances against Patrick Kypson.

This market will resolve to 'Kypson' if Patrick Kypson advances against Michael Mmoh.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 5, 10:00AM-10:15AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
